dashboards.name: UES Co-op & Condo Purchase
dashboards.description: Interactive map and table of UES co-ops and condos for sale. Filters by price, beds, sqft, maintenance, and ownership type. Auto-updated by multi-broker scraper and Zillow Gmail alerts.

dashboards.name: Brooklyn Heights & Cobble Hill Purchase
dashboards.description: Brooklyn purchase tracker focused on Brooklyn Heights and Cobble Hill. $2.5M–$3M, 3+ BR, 2+ BA co-ops and condos. Fed by daily Gmail alert scanner.

dashboards.name: UES Luxury Rental
dashboards.description: UES luxury rental tracker. $12K–$18K/mo, 2+ BR, doorman buildings. Interactive map with Compass scraper integration.

dashboards.name: Google / TripAdvisor — 18 Pack
dashboards.description: Portfolio-wide Google and TripAdvisor review monitoring across the 18-property pack. Tracks ratings, review volume, and sentiment trends.

dashboards.name: CdS Pricing Dashboard
dashboards.description: 'Auana CdS pricing tracker. Daily scraper captures rate data — 198K+ rows and growing. Monitors pricing trends across room types and dates.

dashboards.name: Waikiki Luau Tracker
dashboards.description: Daily availability and sell-out tracking for Waikiki luau experiences. Monitors 14 items across 2,300+ date slots for demand patterns.

dashboards.name: NYC Property Tax Tracker
dashboards.description: NYC hotel and commercial property tax assessments from DOF and ACRIS. Tracks market values, taxable AV, tax rates, historical trends, mortgages, and red flags.
